questions.question: Critically evaluate the concept of 'trustworthiness' in the context of Human-Centred AI, specifically when caring for older adults. What are the key factors that contribute to trustworthiness in this setting? (20 marks)

What are the implications of HCAI on the care and well-being of older adults, as discussed in Chapters 22 and 24 of the textbook? Provide evidence from the relevant chapters to support your answer. (15 marks)

Compare and contrast the approaches to assessing trustworthiness in Human-Centred AI, as outlined in Chapters 25 and 26 of the textbook. How do these approaches address the unique needs of older adults? (10 marks)
